title: Add AI-generated dish images to menu

requirements.text: Generate AI images for each dish listed in frontend/src/data/menuData.ts (e.g., Jigarthanda, Ice Cream, and all other menu items) and save them as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/ with filenames matching the dish references used in menuData.ts.

quotes: No I don't have any specific image you create an AI image and replace it
add the suitable image to the dish like jigarthanda , ice cream .etc

acceptanceCriteria: Every dish in menuData.ts has a corresponding AI-generated image saved in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Each image is visually appropriate for the dish it represents
Images follow a consistent artistic style suitable for a premium Chettinad restaurant

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/data/menuData.ts to replace all existing placeholder or missing image references with the paths to the newly generated dish images stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/.

quotes: add the suitable image to the dish like jigarthanda , ice cream .etc... like this change the suitable image

acceptanceCriteria: All dish entries in menuData.ts reference valid image paths pointing to the generated images
No broken image links remain in the menu data
The DishCard component renders the correct image for each dish on the Menu page

requirements.text: Update the four hardcoded signature dishes in frontend/src/components/home/SignatureDishes.tsx to use the newly generated dish images instead of any placeholder or old image references.

quotes: add the suitable image to the dish like jigarthanda , ice cream .etc

acceptanceCriteria: Each signature dish card on the Home page displays the correct AI-generated image
Images load without errors and display correctly within the card layout

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo — no backend changes required
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Generated images must be stored as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/ — do not route images through the backend
nonGoals: Adding new dishes or changing menu prices
Changing the overall menu layout or card design
Integrating an external image CDN or dynamic image loading service

required: Jigarthanda — a chilled South Indian drink with sarsaparilla syrup, almond gum, reduced milk, and ice cream in a tall glass, top-down shot on dark stone surface (jigarthanda.dim_400x400.png)
Vanilla Ice Cream — two scoops of creamy vanilla ice cream in a ceramic bowl with wafer, warm moody lighting on dark background (ice-cream.dim_400x400.png)
Chettinad Chicken Curry — rich dark brown spiced chicken curry in a clay pot with curry leaves and red chilies, rustic wooden surface (chettinad-chicken-curry.dim_400x400.png)
Mutton Kola Urundai — golden fried minced mutton balls on a banana leaf with mint chutney, close-up shot (mutton-kola-urundai.dim_400x400.png)
Prawn Masala — vibrant orange-red spiced prawns in a cast iron skillet with coriander garnish, dark moody lighting (prawn-masala.dim_400x400.png)
Paneer Tikka — charcoal-grilled paneer cubes with bell peppers on skewers, light smoke wisps, dark background (paneer-tikka.dim_400x400.png)
Chettinad Fish Curry — deep red fish curry with whole spices in a terracotta bowl, banana leaf underneath (chettinad-fish-curry.dim_400x400.png)
Biryani — aromatic saffron-layered Chettinad biryani in a copper handi with fried onions and boiled egg (biryani.dim_400x400.png)
Parotta — flaky layered South Indian parotta stacked on a banana leaf, golden brown, dark atmospheric background (parotta.dim_400x400.png)
Rasam — thin golden-red tomato rasam in a small brass tumbler with curry leaves, steam rising (rasam.dim_400x400.png)
Sambar — thick lentil and vegetable sambar in a clay bowl with drumstick pieces visible (sambar.dim_400x400.png)
Curd Rice — creamy curd rice topped with pomegranate seeds and curry leaf tempering in a white ceramic bowl (curd-rice.dim_400x400.png)
